---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us fix a test failure
labels: bug
---

### Test Stage
- [ ] Happy Path
- [ ] Negative / Edge Case
- [ ] Security / RLS
- [ ] Performance

### Priority
- [ ] P0 - Critical
- [ ] P1 - High
- [ ] P2 - Medium

### Bug Description
Brief summary of what failed.

### Steps to Reproduce / Failed Assertion
1. Run test script `npm run test:happy`
2. Failure logged at `test_bulk_flat_import`
